name: Glazed Cinnamon Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter, sugar, egg yolk, and salt in a bowl. Beat until creamy.
2. Stir in flour and cinnamon until well combined.
3. Spread the thick batter into a lightly greased 15 x 10-inch pan.
4. In a separate bowl, beat the egg white until foamy.
5. Stir in powdered sugar until smooth.
6. Brush the sugar mixture over the batter.
7. Sprinkle chopped walnuts evenly over the top of the batter.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 to 35 minutes, or until set and lightly browned.
9. Remove from the pan and cool on a rack before cutting into bars.
